queries.exists: SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name = 'Proxyman' AND publisher = 'Proxyman LLC';
queries.patched: SELECT 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name = 'Proxyman' AND publisher = 'Proxyman LLC' AND version_compare(version, '3.14.1') < 0);

refs.c8cbfadf:
# Learn more about .exe install scripts:
# http://fleetdm.com/learn-more-about/exe-install-scripts
#
# Proxyman ships as an electron-builder NSIS (Nullsoft) installer.
# It is a per-user installer; /S runs it silently.

$exeFilePath = "${env:INSTALLER_PATH}"

try {
    if (-not (Test-Path $exeFilePath)) {
        Write-Host "Error: Installer file not found at: $exeFilePath"
        Exit 1
    }

    $processOptions = @{
        FilePath = "$exeFilePath"
        ArgumentList = "/S"
        PassThru = $true
        Wait = $true
        NoNewWindow = $true
    }

    Write-Host "Starting Proxyman install with: $($processOptions.ArgumentList)"
    $process = Start-Process @processOptions
    $exitCode = $process.ExitCode
    Write-Host "Install exit code: $exitCode"
    Exit $exitCode

} catch {
    Write-Host "Error: $_"
    Exit 1
}
